requirement.original: Apply the 7 prescribed changes from spec Section 5 — FeedbackForge → FeedbackCoach rebrand and UI/prompt updates.
requirement.clarified: Apply the 7 numbered CHANGES quoted verbatim in Section 5 of /root/feedbackforge/docs/dev/specs/spec-20260426-102329.md: (1) rebrand FeedbackForge→FeedbackCoach in 4 in-app source files + bigger/centered/padded header on dashboard; (2) add 32px circular bg-blue-600 NC logo to the LEFT of the company-team text on the dashboard; (3) expand each employee's tenure to '<N> year[s] at NormalCompany' AND replace the tenure Badge with plain text + lucide Briefcase icon (text-slate-500); (4) remove the Start Over button from DraftActions; (5) on Accept & Save, clipboard.writeText the last assistant message, swap toast to the new 'Copied to clipboard! …' string, push to / after 3000ms; (6) insert META-RULES block in lib/prompts.ts immediately before CONSTRAINTS; (7) replace the existing Harassment/discrimination/safety SPECIAL CASES line with the verbatim multi-line redirect-to-HR + conclude block.
requirement.what: Apply 7 prescribed verbatim text/markup edits across 8 source files; no architectural change.
requirement.why: User wants the brand renamed, sensitive-case handling tightened, leakage of system instructions blocked, and the Accept & Save flow upgraded to copy the actual draft to clipboard rather than just showing a toast.

included: Rename all 4 in-app source occurrences of 'FeedbackForge' to 'FeedbackCoach' (app/page.tsx h1, app/layout.tsx metadata title, lib/prompts.ts comment, lib/prompts.ts system prompt opening)
Bigger (text-4xl) bold centered header with increased margin/padding on dashboard
Inline 32px circular bg-blue-600 white-bold 'NC' div to LEFT of company-team text, gap-2, vertically centered
Expand 4 tenure strings in lib/employees.ts to '<N> year[s] at NormalCompany'
Replace tenure Badge in components/EmployeeCard.tsx with plain text + Briefcase icon (text-slate-500); keep age Badge
Delete Start Over button JSX from components/DraftActions.tsx

Modify onAccept in lib/use-chat-page-actions.ts to call navigator.clipboard.writeText on the last assistant message content, set the new toast string, and navigate after 3000ms; thread session.messages through ChatPageBody → useChatPageActions
Insert META-RULES block (verbatim Section 5 lines 165-176) immediately before CONSTRAINTS: in lib/prompts.ts
Replace existing harassment line in SPECIAL CASES with verbatim Section 5 lines 183-193 redirect-to-HR + conclude block
excluded: README.md, CLAUDE.md, package.json (do not contain 'FeedbackForge' currently and are infrastructure)
Project directory name /root/feedbackforge (per Section 1 — infrastructure, not user-facing)
docs/dev/specs/** and .claude/** (spec history / workflow state — must not be edited)
Any other parts of lib/prompts.ts beyond CHANGES 1, 6, 7
Existing Sparkles icon usage on dashboard header (kept)
Refine Further and Accept & Save button styling/colors (kept)
Chat topbar tenure rendering (kept — will display the longer string)
API route, MiniMax integration, model config (untouched)

success_criteria: Grep 'FeedbackForge' in app/, components/, lib/ returns 0 hits
Grep 'FeedbackCoach' in app/, components/, lib/ returns at least 4 hits
Dashboard h1 computed font-size ≈ 36px (text-4xl), font-weight 700, parent has horizontal centering (text-center or justify-center)
Header outer margin/padding visibly larger than baseline (mb-8 sm:mb-10)
Dashboard renders a 32×32px bg-blue-600 circular div with white bold 'NC' immediately before the company-team text, separated by gap-2 (8px)
lib/employees.ts tenure values exactly match: '1 year at NormalCompany', '7 years at NormalCompany', '5 years at NormalCompany', '2 years at NormalCompany'
components/EmployeeCard.tsx renders Briefcase icon + plain tenure text (no <Badge> for tenure); age Badge still present
components/DraftActions.tsx renders exactly 2 buttons; 'Start Over' string absent

Clicking Accept & Save calls navigator.clipboard.writeText with the last assistant message content, shows toast 'Copied to clipboard! Both the feedback draft and delivery guidance are ready to paste into your notes.', navigates to / after 3000ms
lib/prompts.ts contains the verbatim META-RULES block immediately before 'CONSTRAINTS:'
lib/prompts.ts SPECIAL CASES block contains the verbatim multi-line redirect-to-HR replacement; old single-line harassment string removed
npm run build (or tsc --noEmit + lint) passes with zero errors
Git diff confined to the 8 affected source files
constraints: Verbatim copy required for: META-RULES block (CHANGE 6), harassment replacement block (CHANGE 7), toast string (CHANGE 5), all 4 tenure strings (CHANGE 3a)
No new dependencies (lucide-react Briefcase already available)
Do not modify other parts of the code (user's explicit constraint)
Must not modify hooks, settings.json, or any infrastructure
Production restart (systemctl) only if user explicitly requests live verification — local dev/build is sufficient

pre_existing_guards.code_snippet: function lastIsDraft(messages: Message[], status: string): boolean { if (status !== 'drafted') return false; if (messages.length === 0) return false; return messages[messages.length - 1].role === 'assistant'; }
pre_existing_guards.purpose: Guards rendering of DraftActions — only shows them when the last message is from the assistant in 'drafted' state. CHANGE 5's reliance on the last assistant message is therefore SAFE because Accept & Save is only clickable when this guard already passes.
Age badge — must remain after CHANGE 3 (only the tenure Badge is replaced).
Accept & Save button — must remain (CHANGE 4 only removes Start Over).

pre_existing_guards.code_snippet: <Button onClick={onRefine} variant="outline" className="... border-blue-600 text-blue-600">Refine Further</Button>

pre_existing_guards.purpose: Section header — must remain; CHANGE 7 only modifies the harassment bullet WITHIN this section.
Section header — META-RULES insertion goes immediately ABOVE this; CONSTRAINTS itself unchanged.

development_approach.strategy: Apply each of the 7 CHANGES as the smallest possible diff in the smallest set of files. Order suggested: (1) lib/employees.ts tenure strings; (2) components/EmployeeCard.tsx Briefcase + drop tenure Badge; (3) app/page.tsx header rebrand + size + center + padding + NC logo; (4) app/layout.tsx metadata title rename; (5) components/DraftActions.tsx delete Start Over Button; (6) lib/use-chat-page-actions.ts onAccept rewrite (extend signature to accept messages); (7) components/ChatPageBody.tsx pass session.messages into useChatPageActions; (8) lib/prompts.ts comment + opening rename, META-RULES insertion, harassment-line replacement. Run `npm run lint && npx tsc --noEmit` after each chunk; final `npm run build` once all 7 done.
development_approach.validation_approach: QA: (1) build + typecheck pass; (2) Playwright at 1440x900 + 390x844 — screenshot dashboard, assert h1 text 'FeedbackCoach', assert NC circle bounding box ~32px LEFT of company text, assert 4 cards each show Briefcase icon + 'N year[s] at NormalCompany'; (3) Playwright navigate to /feedback/ken, drive a chat to drafted state, assert exactly 2 action buttons, click Accept & Save, assert clipboard contains the assistant message text (use grantPermissions clipboard-read), assert toast text exact match, assert navigation to / after ~3000ms; (4) Read lib/prompts.ts post-edit and grep for 'META-RULES' (must be above 'CONSTRAINTS:') and 'End your message as a CONCLUSION' (in SPECIAL CASES); (5) Optional CHANGE 7 runtime trigger: chat 'I think Ken is being harassed', assert response does not ask follow-up questions and ends as a conclusion. Local dev/build is sufficient — production restart only if user requests live verification.
